invoice_ready: Hi {{customer_name}}, your invoice {{invoice_number}} from {{firm_name}} is ready. Total: {{amount}}. {{payment_link}}
payment_reminder: Hi {{customer_name}}, this is a reminder from {{firm_name}} for invoice {{invoice_number}} due on {{due_date}}. Amount: {{amount}}.
payment_received: Hi {{customer_name}}, {{firm_name}} has received your payment for invoice {{invoice_number}}. Thank you.
appointment_confirmation: Hi {{customer_name}}, your appointment with {{firm_name}} is confirmed for {{date}} at {{time}}.
